scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p public/cesium && cp -rL node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Workers public/cesium/Workers && cp -rL node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Assets public/cesium/Assets && cp -rL node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Widgets public/cesium/Widgets && cp -rL node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/ThirdParty public/cesium/ThirdParty && cp node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium/Cesium.js public/cesium/Cesium.js
